failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the requirement 'available' and planned a catalog search that included unavailable products instead of filtering to available items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Vacuum Cleaner, so availability is a key constraint. At index 1, the Coordinator had all required information from the user request but planned to search with available_only=false and explicitly said it would search regardless of current availability. This violates the user's constraint and sets the wrong retrieval plan. The later answer happens to choose an available item, but the original error in interpreting/planning around availability was not explicitly corrected.
